tasks.build: deno run -A npm:tsdown@0.22.2 ./src/index.ts ./src/cli/gumbox.ts --format esm --dts --clean --external mitt --external mlly --external pathe --external tinyglobby --external vite --out-dir dist --target node22.0.0
tasks.lint: VP_VERSION=0.1.20 deno run -A npm:oxlint@1.61.0 --config vite.config.ts src test/cli.test.ts test/gumbox.test.ts test/index.test.ts test/support/host-file-system.ts vite.config.ts
tasks.check: deno task fmt:check && deno task lint && deno task typecheck
